name: identifier
title: Identifier
description: The organization-identity band below the site footer: an optional domain and ownership statement, a labelled navigation of locally appropriate policy and support links, and an optional local resource pointer. It uses the clarity of the USWDS identifier without assuming a .gov domain, federal language, or a federal destination.
useWhen: The very last band on every page of an official government website, directly below the footer
Publishing the policy and support links required by the site's own jurisdiction, such as Accessibility, Privacy, Public records, Contact, and Terms
Stating which public organization operates the site and optionally pointing to a useful local service or contact resource
avoidWhen: Sites that cannot accurately identify the public organization operating the service
General footer navigation like departments and services (use the footer component)
The top-of-page official-website banner (use gov-banner — the identifier is its bottom-of-page counterpart)

keyboard: Tab moves focus through policy, support, and optional resource links in document order; Shift+Tab reverses
Enter activates a link (native anchor behavior — no custom key handling)
The band adds no focus traps and no composite-widget arrow-key behavior
accessibility.targetSize: 44px project default (identifier links render as min-h-11 targets)
